herbs.herb_desc: Achillea millefolium, also known as yarrow essential oil, is derived from the flowers of the yarrow plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. The oil is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and promoting wound healing. Additionally, yarrow essential oil has been traditionally used to ease digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps due to its antispasmodic and analgesic properties.
